annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Wyo. Stat. Ann. Sec. 40-14-106(e) — 7% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Wyoming’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
